feed.title: ZhgChgLi (Harry Li)
feed.subtitle: An iOS, web, and automation developer from Taiwan 🇹🇼 who also loves sharing, traveling, and writing.

entry.title: Google Offerwall 廣告— 內容創作者的全新收益選擇

link.title: Google Offerwall 廣告— 內容創作者的全新收益選擇

entry.summary: Google Offerwall 廣告的淺談與試用，可快速將既有流量內容轉換成限制小額支持或觀看廣告後才能存取。

entry.title: Google Offerwall Ads — A New Revenue Option for Content Creators

link.title: Google Offerwall Ads — A New Revenue Option for Content Creators

entry.summary: A brief discussion and trial of Google Offerwall ads, which can quickly convert existing traffic content into limited small support or access after watching ads.

entry.title: CI/CD 實戰指南（四）：使用 Google Apps Script Web App 串接 GitHub Actions 建置免費易用的打包工具平台

link.title: CI/CD 實戰指南（四）：使用 Google Apps Script Web App 串接 GitHub Actions 建置免費易用的打包工具平台

entry.summary: GAS Web App 串接 GitHub, Slack, Firebase 或 Asana/Jira API，建置中繼站，提供跨團隊共用的打包工具平台

entry.title: CI/CD Practical Guide (Part 4): Building a Free and User-Friendly Packaging Tool Platform with Google Apps Script Web App and GitHub Actions

link.title: CI/CD Practical Guide (Part 4): Building a Free and User-Friendly Packaging Tool Platform with Google Apps Script Web App and GitHub Actions

entry.summary: Integrating GAS Web App with GitHub, Slack, Firebase, or Asana/Jira API to create a relay station that provides a packaging tool platform for cross-team sharing.

entry.title: CI/CD 實戰指南（三）：使用 GitHub Actions 實作 App iOS CI 與 CD 工作流程

link.title: CI/CD 實戰指南（三）：使用 GitHub Actions 實作 App iOS CI 與 CD 工作流程

entry.summary: iOS App 自動化建置、測試、部署的 GitHub Actions 實作步驟完整教學
